front: What is the role of clinical pharmacogenomics in peptide therapy?
back: Pharmacogenomics affects peptide response: 1) HLA typing (immunogenicity risk), 2) Receptor polymorphisms (drug sensitivity), 3) Metabolic enzyme variants (protease expression), 4) Disease subtypes (biomarker-guided therapy). Examples: HLA-B*5701 and abacavir (not peptide, but illustrates principle), OPRM1 variants and opioid response.
